verses.text: Ask the LORD for the latter rain; the idols speak vanity, and the people wandered like a troubled flock. False shepherds fail. Only God gives the rain that idols cannot.
Ask the LORD for the latter rain; the idols speak vanity, and the people wandered like a troubled flock. False shepherds fail. Only God gives the rain that idols cannot.
His anger is against the shepherds; He has visited His flock and made them 'as his goodly horse in the battle.' Weak made strong. God transforms the helpless into the mighty.
His anger is against the shepherds; He has visited His flock and made them 'as his goodly horse in the battle.' Weak made strong. God transforms the helpless into the mighty.
His anger is against the shepherds; He has visited His flock and made them 'as his goodly horse in the battle.' Weak made strong. God transforms the helpless into the mighty.
He will strengthen Judah, save Joseph, and bring them again, for He has mercy; their heart shall rejoice. Glad return. God's mercy regathers and gladdens His people.
He will strengthen Judah, save Joseph, and bring them again, for He has mercy; their heart shall rejoice. Glad return. God's mercy regathers and gladdens His people.
'I will hiss for them, and gather them'; He will bring them from Egypt and Assyria, and they shall increase. Called home. God whistles for His scattered ones, and they come.
'I will hiss for them, and gather them'; He will bring them from Egypt and Assyria, and they shall increase. Called home. God whistles for His scattered ones, and they come.
'I will hiss for them, and gather them'; He will bring them from Egypt and Assyria, and they shall increase. Called home. God whistles for His scattered ones, and they come.

He shall bring them through 'the sea of affliction'; 'I will strengthen them in the LORD,' and they shall walk in His name. Strength in His name. God carries His people through trouble by His own power.
